ZillowPropertyRecord.description: Welcome to this charming 3 bed, 1.5 bath single-family home nestled on a .23-acre lot in north Titusville. This home offers great potential for investors, first-time buyers or anyone looking to put their personal touch on a home.  Features include a formal living room, a spacious eat in kitchen and a huge 27 x 16 sq ft. bonus room under air that is not reflected on the property appraiser site. Enjoy a fully fenced backyard with a large storage shed and a covered carport with ample storage.   A/C 2024.  Roof 2013.  Sold As-Is.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description:
Welcome to  a charming and affordable 2-bedroom, 2-bath home in Titusville that offers comfort, convenience, and a great location. Whether you're a first-time homebuyer, downsizing, or looking for an investment opportunity, this home provides the perfect blend of value and accessibility.
Inside, you'll find a functional layout designed for easy living, with comfortable living spaces and two well-sized bedrooms. The home is ideal for those seeking low-maintenance living at an affordable price point in one of Florida's most desirable coastal communities.
Location is key, and this property delivers. Enjoy easy access to shopping, schools, and major highways, making daily errands and commuting simple. Spend your weekends exploring the nearby Indian River waterfront, taking advantage of Titusville's beautiful parks, or making a quick drive to the Atlantic beaches for sun and surf.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description:
The kind of home that feels just right. As you step through the front door, you're welcomed into a bright, open living space that flows effortlessly and makes everyday living feel easy. The kitchen immediately catches your eye with its clean, modern finishes and generous counter space, all opening right into the main living area so you're always part of what's happening. Moving through the home, the bedrooms offer a comfortable, relaxed feel, while the bathrooms have already been refreshed with a clean, updated look. There's also a versatile bonus space that gives you options, home office, gym, playroom, second living area., whatever fits your lifestyle.
Out back, you've got the kind of space that's hard to find, room to spread out, entertain, or just enjoy some quiet time outside.
The best part? The big-ticket items are already handled. With a newer roof (2021) plus updated plumbing, electrical, and AC, you can move in without worrying about major projects.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description:
Opportunity with Space, Character, and Flexibility.

This spacious property offers room to breathe, character worth preserving, and a location that works for you. Whether you're looking to modernize or add value through thoughtful updates, this home provides that flexibility.  The flexible layout allows you to shape the space around your lifestyle, whether you envision a dedicated home office, inviting gathering areas, or multi-purpose rooms that evolve with your needs.

The location checks important boxes, offering everyday convenience without sacrificing quality of life. Restaurants, parks, and popular fishing areas are all nearby, with the Kennedy Space Center Visitor Complex approximately 30 minutes away and Orlando International Airport about an hour's drive.

With a fresh price adjustment, this property presents a practical option for buyers ready to make it their own.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description: Stunning historic Craftsman waterfront home on the Indian River Lagoon featuring 5 bedrooms, 3.5 baths, and 3,300 sq ft of timeless charm and modern upgrades. Highlights include original Southern pine floors, wood-burning fireplace, custom built-ins, and newly installed hurricane impact windows. Enjoy a screened-in pool, outside shower, two private courtyards, and a detached 2-car garage with a bonus room and full bath--ideal for guests or a private office. Take in panoramic river views from the second-story sunroom with cozy window seats. Outdoor living shines with a coquina seawall, riverside deck with fire pit, and an impressive 250-ft dock with boat lift and two-story platform. Prime location offers breathtaking views of rocket launches across the river at Kennedy Space Center. This is more than a home--it's a rare opportunity to own a piece of history with unmatched waterfront views and lifestyle.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description: This 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home features approximately 1,822 sq. ft. of living space and sits on an expansive lot with mature landscaping. The interior showcases durable Luxury Vinyl Plank flooring throughout the main living areas and cozy carpeting in the bedrooms. The kitchen is equipped with shaker-style cabinetry, granite countertops, a teal subway tile backsplash, and stainless steel appliances. The open-concept living room includes frosted glass barn doors that open into a bright sunroom, providing a flexible space for a home office or playroom. Functional additions include a separate laundry and workshop area, and a double carport. The large backyard serves as a private retreat with fruit trees, a detached storage shed, and a spacious patio featuring an outdoor sink. With a spacious design and plenty of room to enjoy the outdoors, this property presents an inviting opportunity for Florida living. No HOA and with great potential for short-term rentals. Schedule a showing now!

ZillowPropertyRecord.description: Looking for a custom block home on an oversized secluded lot in Titusville, look no further! This stunning 3 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, with an oversized 2 car garage home has plenty of room for your family with 2247 square feet of living space. The inside features a gas fireplace with coral travertine stone, laminate flooring throughout the main living area, new water heater, new carpet and freshly painted bedrooms. The master bathroom features a curbless shower, a jet soaker tub that feels like your own spa, and a large walk-in closet. The outside features 1.17 acres, 2021 roof, irrigation system, and front and rear screened in porches. Enjoy indoor outdoor Florida living on your rear patio, perfect for entertaining and enjoying your coffee and view. There is plenty of room for a pool and detached garage. Highly desired location near Fox Lake Park where you can enjoy fishing, boating, playground, walking trails, volleyball, and festivities.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description: Situated on a 1 acre lot, this 5000+ SF modern farmhouse style pool home is located in the well regarded Rambling Acres subdivision in NW Titusville. The 1st floor offers 4 bedrooms, a formal living room, formal dining room, family room with electric fireplace, updated gourmet eat in kitchen with granite countertops, stainless steel appliances & a beverage fridge plus a mud room & laundry room off of the kitchen with a separate entrance. The 2nd level could be used as an in-law suite. It includes a family room, kitchenette, game room, 1 bedroom with an ensuite bathroom, an additional full guest bathroom & a private entrance with an exterior deck that overlooks the backyard. Exterior features include a screened in solar heated chlorine pool, a covered outdoor entertainment area with a bar, a fully fenced yard with a shed and a playground backing up to a wooded area where wildlife resides. There are so many upgrades to note to include a new roof with solar vents in 2025. A new electric panel with surge protection for the entire home, upgraded light fixtures, new electric outlets and switches, new flooring + so much more. Just minutes to Fox Lake Park where you can enjoy a fishing dock, canoe / kayak launch, and a boat ramp (with access to South Lake from Fox Lake, and numerous channels to explore by canoe / kayak).

address.subdivision: ROYAL OAK GOLF & COUNTRY CLUB SEC 07

ZillowPropertyRecord.description: NO HOA + POOL + PRIVACY! Welcome to Royal Oak Golf & Country Club. This well-maintained 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home is ideally situated at the end of a quiet dead-end street in Titusville, offering both privacy and peaceful surroundings. Inside, you’ll find vaulted ceilings that create an open and spacious feel, along with a cozy wood-burning fireplace that adds warmth and character to the main living area. In the living space, you’ll also find a convenient wet bar, perfect for entertaining. The home features brand-new flooring throughout and a desirable split floor plan for added comfort and privacy. The primary bathroom has been completely renovated, giving the space a fresh, modern feel. The kitchen comes fully equipped with all appliances included, and the washer and dryer convey with the home for added convenience. Step outside to your own private Florida retreat, featuring a screened-in pool perfect for relaxing or entertaining year-round. The backyard also includes an oversized shed, offering excellent storage space for tools, hobbies, or outdoor equipment, along with an additional rear outdoor storage closet attached to the home. This property offers the ideal combination of comfort, privacy, and freedom to enjoy your home your way. The A/C unit was replaced in 2023 and is blowing cold, crisp air, providing comfort and efficiency year-round. Conveniently located in Central Florida, you’re approximately 40 minutes from the beaches of Cocoa Beach and about 45 minutes to Orlando’s world-class dining, shopping, and attractions. A rare find you don’t want to miss it.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description:
Wow! $14,000 Price Improvement! Perfectly landscaped with a huge yard, this home will steal your heart before you even step inside. Thoughtfully designed, it blends comfort and functionality with an open-concept layout ideal for everyday living and entertaining. Cozy up by the wood-burning fireplace beneath elegant tray ceilings, surrounded by built-ins and abundant storage throughout.
The kitchen truly shines with tons of cabinetry, a rolling island, a built-in desk, and seamless flow into the living spaces! Formal living and dining rooms offer flexibility, while skylights and two sets of sliders fill the home with natural light and open to an enclosed, screened patio.
Outside, enjoy your private retreat featuring a heated in-ground spa! Plantation shutters, no carpet, and an inside laundry room with cabinetry add style and convenience. Recent updates include a newer roof, AC, KitchenAid appliances, exterior paint, added attic insulation, and a sprinkler system. Located in a quiet neighborhood. Roof less than a year old, outside fully repainted 6 months ago, New refrigerator (KitchenAid) 1 year old, Dishwasher 2 years old (KitchenAid), Installed extra insulation in attic, New A/C unit 1 ½ years ago, Plantation shutters, Lawn sprinkler system, spa is heated, and hot water sauna if desired!

ZillowPropertyRecord.description:
Tucked away on a beautiful street, steps from the river, lies an incredible home. Completely remodeled in 2024 and 2025, this property is full of charm and beauty. The front room is light and bright with brick walls, large windows with river views, and wood beams on the ceiling. Inside the main living space has luxury life-proof flooring throughout, brand new trim, and custom woodwork in every room. Remodeled kitchen includes granite counters, shaker cabinets, and stainless steel appliances. Primary suite features a custom vanity, cedar lined walk-in closet. Main bathroom shows off double vanities with cultured marble countertops and tile to the ceiling. 
All cast iron removed and plumbing updated with PVC and PEX. BRAND NEW septic system as well. Roof and electrical are 2022, and yard is fully fenced! Walk to the river for incredible fishing, and front row seat views of launches and holiday fireworks displays!

ZillowPropertyRecord.description:
PRICE IMPROVEMENT - MOTIVATED SELLER! ALL OFFERS CONSIDERED
Enjoy premier riverfront living directly across from the iconic Kennedy Space Center. Watch breathtaking rocket launches right from your private balcony or the community fishing dock. This outdoor lover's paradise offers endless opportunities for fishing, shrimping, and relaxing while taking in peaceful river views. The resort-style community features a large inground pool, clubhouse, and shuffleboard courts. The HOA fee covers water, sewer, garbage, cable TV, internet, and more--making for easy, low-maintenance living. This fully updated and recently painted 2-bedroom, 2-bath condo is truly move-in ready. The home features a modern kitchen with granite countertops and stainless steel appliances, updated bathrooms, durable vinyl flooring throughout, and included window treatments. Move-in ready convenience with a brand new HVAC (2024). Don't miss this opportunity to own a slice of Florida waterfront living.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description:
Welcome to this desirable Sherwood Forest townhome, offering over 1,900 sq. feet of beautifully maintained living space. 

This sought-after 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom home w a 2-car garage features wood vinyl & tile flooring, a newer roof and AC, & a new hot water heater. 

The modern kitchen boasts a tile backsplash, upgraded hardware, soft-close cabinets, & ample storage, all overlooking the spacious living area perfect for entertaining.

In the formal living room French doors open to a bright Florida room with a peaceful backyard for relaxing & enjoying. 

The large primary suite includes a sitting area & en suite bath w a shower & separate water closet. 

Plenty of storage, closet space & built in shelving (garage)

Enjoy neutral tones & abundant natural light throughout. This home has been very lovingly maintained.

Gated front courtyard with pavers perfect for dining al fresco!

The HOA covers exterior maintenance, roof care, cable & internet!

Tucked away on a quiet dead-end street.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description:
Welcome to 3420 Fox Wood Dr., a beautifully updated 4 bedroom home located in the desirable Windover Farms of Titusville. This thoughtfully designed residence features an open split floor plan that offers both privacy and effortless flow, enhanced by vaulted ceilings in the main living area that create a bright, airy feel. Luxury vinyl plank flooring runs throughout the main spaces. The kitchen features elegant granite countertops, ample cabinetry, and an open layout ideal for both everyday living and entertaining.
Enjoy peace of mind with numerous upgrades completed within the past 10 years, including a tankless water heater, 2021 roof, and impact windows. The front and back yard sprinkler system keeps the landscaping lush and low-maintenance, while the screened-in front and back porches provide inviting spaces to relax and enjoy Florida living year-round. Step out back to take in tranquil lake views. Approximately 2 acres of this property is conservation/wetlands area for privacy.

ZillowPropertyRecord.description: WELCOME HOME! You won't want to miss this spacious and beautiful 5-bedroom pool home situated on a half-acre lot within the La Cita subdivision! 2021 Roof, 2018 HVAC, solar heated pool, vaulted ceilings, new stainless appliances, and updates throughout are some of the great features of this home.  The convenient location should not be overlooked! Shopping, dining, and entertainment nearby with rocket launch views from your own yard! Short commute to Kennedy Space Center, Blue Origin, Space X. Within an hour of Orlando, theme parks, airport, and the beaches!

ZillowPropertyRecord.description: Completed in 2026 and never lived in, this BRAND NEW CONSTRUCTION home in the Read & Allen subdivision of Titusville offers the rare opportunity to own a fresh, move-in ready property with transferable manufacturer warranties and NO HOA restrictions! Thoughtfully designed with modern finishes and an easy, OPEN CONCEPT layout, this home delivers the clean, contemporary style you have been searching for. LUXURY VINYL PLANK FLOORING runs throughout, creating a seamless look and easy maintenance. The open concept main living area flows effortlessly into the kitchen, making everyday living and entertaining feel natural and comfortable. The kitchen showcases an on-trend design with QUARTZ COUNTERTOPS, stainless steel appliances (to be installed), ample cabinet and counter space, and a center ISLAND with bar seating, all finished in a fresh, modern color palette. Natural light fills the PRIMARY SUITE, creating a bright and relaxing retreat. The space features a WALK-IN CLOSET and a private en-suite bath highlighted by a CUSTOM TILED SHOWER, lighted touchscreen mirror, and a window that brings in beautiful light. Two additional bedrooms are positioned nearby and share a well-appointed second bathroom with a dual sink vanity, LIGHTED TOUCHSCREEN MIRRORS, custom tiled tub/shower combo, and a convenient linen closet. Set on a CORNER LOT with attractive landscaping and added curb appeal, the front entrance provides visual interest and a welcoming first impression. With no HOA, homeowners have the freedom and flexibility that is increasingly hard to find, and the location places you just minutes from the Halifax River and the beautiful Space Coast beaches, while still offering quick access to I-95 and US-1 for commuting or an easy drive into Orlando via SR-50. Whether you are looking for a primary residence, a second home near the coast, or a low-maintenance new build, this Titusville property delivers modern living in a convenient location!

ZillowPropertyRecord.description: Custom designed and built by the owner with a focus on quality, efficiency, and long-term durability, this home features impact-rated windows and doors, R-38 insulation, and foam-injected block construction--offering enhanced storm protection, energy savings, and peace of mind. Thoughtfully upgraded throughout, this property blends craftsmanship with functional design. Inside, you'll find 9'4'' ceilings with coffered details and rope lighting, creating a clean, elevated feel throughout the main living spaces. The kitchen is designed with both function and entertaining in mind, offering a fully shelved pantry, exterior-vented range hood, and a spacious bar seating area. Thoughtful upgrades including custom window treatments, remote-controlled ceiling fans, and built-in storage solutions add everyday convenience. The primary suite includes a custom-built closet system and a well-appointed bathroom with tile extending to the ceiling and tall counters. Additional features such as two hall closets, attached bedroom shelving, and standard carpet padding reflects the attention to detail carried throughout the home. The laundry room is both practical and well-designed, offering direct access to the oversized 2-car garage, complete with cabinetry, sink, and hanging space. The garage features 10' insulated doors, WiFi capability, and is prepped for a mini-split system, along with an exterior generator hookup. Outdoor spaces are equally considered, featuring a screened-in porch, privacy fencing, and a circular driveway that enhances both curb appeal and functionality, providing ample parking for guests. Extended concrete areas along the side and rear of the home, along with additional overflow parking, offer flexibility for multiple vehicles, recreational equipment, or work-related needs. A matching shed adds even more storage. Built with efficiency and resilience in mind, the home includes a private well for irrigation, a programmable multi-zone system, and comprehensive drainage solutions with underground downspouts and water management systems. A termite bond has been maintained since construction and was recently renewed, and the A/C system is serviced under an active maintenance contract. A rare opportunity to own a thoughtfully designed and well-built home where quality materials, efficiency, and functionality were prioritized from the start
